failures.failure: Claiming the same passive surface is transparent and black at the same wavelength, direction, temperature and state.
failures.oak_response: Separate visible/NIR transmission or reflection from thermal IR absorption/emission; cite Kirchhoff boundary.

failures.failure: Presenting passive radiative cooling as energy generation from vacuum.
failures.oak_response: State bounded net heat rejection only; no free energy; require net radiation calculation.

failures.failure: Converting simulated gross climate value directly into revenue or certified credits.
failures.oak_response: Keep value hypothesis, MRV evidence and certified credit as distinct states.

failures.failure: Double-counting methane repair impact across plume, source, operator or jurisdiction boundaries.
failures.oak_response: Require attribution, uncertainty, deduplication and source registry before priority claims.

failures.failure: Treating a low-power bench scaffold as a certified energy product.
failures.oak_response: Label as experimental low-voltage bench until measured and independently reviewed.

failures.failure: Public copy implies certification, official finding, legal patent status or guaranteed revenue.
failures.oak_response: Use proof-ledger language with explicit status and non-claims.

failures.failure: Viewer or demo graph is mistaken for operational decision authority.
failures.oak_response: Add demo-only and human-review-required boundary to every public/demo artifact.

next_gates: Generate local OAK issue drafts from these failures.
Map each failure to claim ledger rows.
Add public proof-ledger seed with conservative language.
Add optional snapshot tests after output format stabilizes.
